name: Gohōbi gohan
overview: Sakiko Ikeda is a newbie in the workforce struggling to keep up with work. In order to reward herself for having worked hard during the week, Sakiko cooks elaborate meals at home or goes to eat at restaurants which are interesting.

trailers.title: 真夜中ドラマ「ごほうびごはん」第1話 | ＢＳテレ東
